employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Removed imports for Hazelcast client classes that are no longer used in the code.
Replaced the commented-out Hazelcast client bean with an active server-side Config bean that includes serialization configuration.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: Replaced the commented `HazelcastInstance hazelcastInstance()` method with an active `@Bean Config config()` method that sets instance name, cluster name, management center config, and serializer config.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Standardized code indentation from tabs to spaces to match project style.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: Changed indentation of `main` method and new `config` method from tabs to 4 spaces.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace manual DynamicPropertySource configuration with the Spring Boot 3.1+ @ServiceConnection annotation to automatically bind Testcontainers to the application context.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: Added @ServiceConnection to MySQLContainer and removed @DynamicPropertySource method.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Explicitly specify the MySQL image version in the container constructor to ensure reproducible builds and compatibility.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: Changed new MySQLContainer() to new MySQLContainer<>("mysql:8.0").

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Add generic type parameter to MySQLContainer field declaration to satisfy stricter type checking or API changes in newer Testcontainers versions.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: Changed MySQLContainer MYSQL to MySQLContainer<?> MYSQL.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Standardize indentation from mixed/tabs to spaces for consistent code style.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: Re-indented class body and method contents.
